allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Dashboard connect: %{time_connect}s, TTFB: %{time_starttransfer}s, Total: %{time_total}s, Size: %{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Dashboard 1st: TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s Total=%{time_total}s Size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Dashboard 2nd \(cached\): TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s Total=%{time_total}s Size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Inventory: TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s Total=%{time_total}s Size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/inventory)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Inventory cached: TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s Total=%{time_total}s Size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/inventory)
Bash(curl -s -L -o /dev/null -w "Inventory \(follow redirects\): TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s Total=%{time_total}s Size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/inventory)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Dashboard: connect=%{time_connect}s TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s total=%{time_total}s size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Inventory: connect=%{time_connect}s TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s total=%{time_total}s size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/inventory)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Dashboard: TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s total=%{time_total}s size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Inventory: TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s total=%{time_total}s size=%{size_download}b\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "item-image \(HTTP URL redirect\): TTFB=%{time_starttransfer}s total=%{time_total}s\\n" -u admin:pokemon123 http://localhost:3000/api/item-image/1)
